title: ❤️ Join this Weekly Newsletter: Digital process, monday.com, workflow, automation, board building, & more!

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
👋 Hello Everyone!

For those that are not familiar, CarbonWeb runs a weekly newsletter covering a range of topics in and around monday, coined the Digital Directive.

We’re certified channel partners, app developers, solution providers, and long-term users of the platform who seek to educate and inform monday users while aiding them along their journey with the platform.

Join 2,100+ companies already subscribed →

We just sent out our 50th Edition of the Digital Directive!

Take a look: Mid-Year Review with monday.com →

We’re investing resources in the Digital Directive, to reface it, enhance the content, include more of you (the community), and overall, add more value to the monday community.

Here’s an idea what to expect, in the last few editions we covered:

  • Building Useful Dashboards in DD#45
  • Using Subitems Efficiently in DD#46
  • KPIs, Metrics & Data-Driven Decisions in DD#47
  • Streamlining Project Management in DD#48
  • Admin 101 in DD#49

Subscribe ahead of our 52nd edition! (1 Year anniversary)

There may be some awesome discounts rolling around this summer for Digital Directive Subscribers! Join today →
